Table '10001' 3-max Seat #1 is the button
Seat 1: aaaa1111 (300 in chips)
Seat 2: Hero (300 in chips)
Seat 3: bbbb2222 (300 in chips)
Hero: posts small blind 10
bbbb2222: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to aaaa1111
Dealt to Hero [2h Ah]
Dealt to bbbb2222
aaaa1111: folds
Hero: raises 280 to 300 and is all-in
bbbb2222: calls 280 and is all-in
Hero: shows [2h Ah]
bbbb2222: shows [3h 4h]
*** FLOP *** [7h 5d 4d]
*** TURN *** [7h 5d 4d] [4s]
*** RIVER *** [7h 5d 4d 4s] [9s]
*** SHOWDOWN ***
bbbb2222 collected 600 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
Total pot 600 | Rake 0 | Jackpot 0 | Bingo 0 | Fortune 0 | Tax 0
Board [7h 5d 4d 4s 9s]
Seat 1: aaaa1111 (button) folded before Flop (didn't bet)
Seat 2: Hero (small blind) showed [2h Ah] and lost with a pair of Fours
Seat 3: bbbb2222 (big blind) showed [3h 4h] and won (600) with three of a kind, Fours

Table '10001' 3-max Seat #2 is the button
Seat 1: aaaa1111 (300 in chips)
Seat 2: Hero (300 in chips)
Seat 3: bbbb2222 (300 in chips)
bbbb2222: posts small blind 10
Hero: posts big blind 20
*** HOLE CARDS ***
Dealt to aaaa1111
Dealt to Hero [8d 6h]
Dealt to bbbb2222
aaaa1111: folds
bbbb2222: raises 20 to 40
Hero: calls 20
*** FLOP *** [8h Td 6s]
bbbb2222: bets 20
Hero: calls 20
*** TURN *** [8h Td 6s] [Js]
bbbb2222: bets 53
Hero: folds
Uncalled bet (53) returned to bbbb2222
*** SHOWDOWN ***
bbbb2222 collected 120 from pot
*** SUMMARY ***
